message:
fix(tests): create minimal tantivy index for search payload tests

The empty_query and invalid_filter_key tests need a valid lexical index
to get past the "no index found" pre-check. Previously they relied on
a shared .frankensearch/ dir left by other test runs; with isolated
temp dirs they need to create their own.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
